channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.4.3
item.description:
• Fixed dictation and meetings not recording your microphone while Bluetooth headphones were connected.
  • Added a microphone picker in Settings to choose which mic to record from.
  • Meeting transcripts no longer make speaker names bold.
